ground_truth.title: News Product Management Certification — News Product Alliance
ground_truth.main_content: The NPMC is a rigorous, part-time, and virtual program designed for mid to senior-level news professionals that brings together a diverse cohort of 25-30 participants from across the global news industry. Our exclusive program is designed specifically for news professionals to gain the product strategy, technical expertise, and change management skills necessary to lead news product development and innovation. The program is offered in partnership with the Craig Newmark Graduate School of Journalism at CUNY and the J+ Educational Innovation Lab. Those who successfully complete this program will gain an understanding of key product development and management methodologies used in top newsrooms, apply product management frameworks to real-life examples through case studies, develop their leadership style and change management skills, and be prepared to launch the next phase of their career in news product management. Participants will also receive a certificate that will open the door to new career opportunities. By joining NPMC, you'll become part of a powerful alumni network of over 100 news product professionals worldwide. Applications for Cohort 5 are closed. The cohort will participate for 3.5 months in weekly live virtual sessions with experienced news product professionals, receiving reading materials, instructor-led discussions, and coaching sessions. At the end of the program, participants will present a final project that showcases their ability to lead strategic decision-making for a news product.
with: Our exclusive program is designed specifically for news professionals to gain the product strategy, technical expertise, and change management skills necessary to lead news product development and innovation.

The NPMC is a rigorous, part-time, and virtual program designed for mid to senior-level news professionals that brings together a diverse cohort of 25-30 participants from across the global news industry.
By joining NPMC, you'll also become part of a powerful alumni network of over 100 news product professionals worldwide.
Participants will also receive a certificate that will open the door to new career opportunities in news product management.
The expected time commitment is 3.5 months and consists of an estimated 7-10 hours of studying and project work per week.
